response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong software development experience and proficiency in C, but his background lacks direct exposure to embedded networking, Linux kernel modifications, or security features relevant to LAN-switch products. His expertise in web/mobile development and D-lang does not align closely with the embedded firmware and networking requirements. Native Japanese proficiency is also unverified.
strengths: Strong C programming experience (e.g., National Instruments, NI LabWindows/CVI)
Proficient in Linux and system-level development (e.g., embedded tools, real-time systems)
Demonstrated ability to learn and adapt to new technologies quickly (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, MCP)
concerns: No clear experience with embedded networking, LAN-switch products, or chip-vendor SDKs
Lacks direct involvement in security features like MACsec, 802.1X, or encryption technologies
Japanese language proficiency is not explicitly stated; English is fluent but not native-level
